g.text: SAX-style: strip script/style tags on the fly
Never hold raw page in memory

svg.text: 1. HEAD eliminated: single GET with streaming header check saves one RTT per URL
2. HTML cleaning during download: never hold raw page in memory
3. Three filter gates collapsed into one (Bloom + blacklist + rate limit)
4. Link extraction and KVS write happen in parallel, not sequentially
5. Content Bloom runs on cleaned text (smaller input = faster hashing)
